clean-server & none & 4/4 & none \\
startup-stdout-pollution-server & stdout banner before initialize & 4/4 & \texttt{static-stdout-write}, \texttt{stdout-non-json} \\
stderr-diagnostics-server & diagnostics written to stderr only & 4/4 & none \\

malformed-json-server & malformed stdout JSON during tools/list & 4/4 & \texttt{operation-timeout}, \texttt{stdout-non-json} \\
content-length-framing-server & Content-Length framing on stdout & 4/4 & \texttt{stdout-content-length-framing} \\
missing-initialize-response-server & missing initialize response & 4/4 & \texttt{initialize-timeout} \\
wrong-response-id-server & initialize response id mismatch & 4/4 & \texttt{response-id-mismatch} \\
crash-after-initialize-server & process crash after initialized notification & 4/4 & \texttt{adversarial-probe-crash}, \texttt{server-crashed} \\
duplicate-tool-name-server & duplicate tools/list names & 4/4 & \texttt{tool-name-duplicate} \\
invalid-tool-schema-server & invalid tools/list inputSchema.required & 4/4 & \texttt{tool-input-schema-required-missing} \\
capability-drift-server & capability and tool-list drift across repeat runs & 2/2 & \texttt{repeat-capability-drift}, \texttt{repeat-tool-drift} \\
